title: Cobblefusions!
description: A datapack that introduces fusions into cobblemon, Cobblefusions!
body:
![Cobblefusions!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/854dc71fa50ba51504b8e6d8f17eb08ad85c2104.png)

A datapack that introduces fusions into your game!

Special thanks to the creator of CobbleMotion, [Lenkagari](https://modrinth.com/user/Lenkagari), for allowing me to use their animations!
## Fusions!

<details>
<summary>Bulbakoal</summary>

![Bulbakoal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75629eee252fb403ffab1a89795e256c629f26d0_0.webp)

### Typing: Grass/Fire
### Possible Abilities:
    1. Chlorophyll
    2. White Smoke    
    3. Flame Body
    4. Drought
    5. Shell Armor
- HP: 105
- Atk: 70
- Def: 145
- SpA: 85
- SpD: 100
- Spd: 60

</details>

**To fuse your pokemon just simply right click on the first pokemon with your DNA Splicer and then right click the base pokemon :)**
